untranslatable_reason: This signal requires identification of counterparty trading motivations (e.g., index rebalancing, forced liquidation, non-profit behavior) and real-time order flow analysis. These require market microstructure data, order book analysis, and counterparty intent detection that are NOT available in the allowed indicator set (which contains only price, volume, and technical indicators). The core logic depends on: (1) detecting non-profit motivations in real-time, (2) identifying loser order flow composition, (3) measuring position size vs loser notional - none of which can be derived from OHLCV and standard technicals. This signal is fundamentally incompatible with a price-action-only backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_8_2 is a microstructure-based strategy requiring real-time counterparty motivation detection and order flow decomposition. It cannot be translated to technical indicators without access to: (a) order book depth/imbalance metrics, (b) large trader identification, (c) executed order analysis by counterparty type, (d) forced liquidation signals. The parameters reference 'loser_order_flow_threshold_pct' and 'position_size_vs_loser_notional' which require order-level data unavailable in standard OHLCV backtests.
